Video.summary: T-Jay says it is time to share his deep, dark secret with the woman he has been seeing; Natasha wants to marry her baby's father, but he is miserable in the relationship; Sasha's boyfriend betrayed her trust.
Video.title: One Night Stands Reunited

Video.summary: Three best friends agree to have a threesome; Leo's fiancee confronts her cousin about some explicit photos she sent to him; Brian wants to leave his possessive girlfriend, but she refuses to give up without a fight.
Video.title: Threesomes and Throwdowns

Video.summary: Eddie has been with his girlfriend for 3 years but he wants to tell her that he has been sleeping with a man for the last 5 months of their relationship.
Video.title: Heartless Homewreckers

Video.summary: CeCe is here to tell her girlfriend, Michelle, that she is cheating with PJ who's a man! Next Silas is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend! Then Mark recently caught his fiance, Liz, in bed with her lover, Angie!
Video.title: Hot Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: A man suspects his girlfriend is sleeping with his uncle; a woman's boyfriend cheats with her friend.
Video.title: Five People, 8 Dogs, One Trailer

Video.summary: Jen learns that her boyfriend hooked up with a stripper and someone else; Itzy's boyfriend cheated with her cousin Zuly; Ashley takes vengeance on the "friend" who wrecked her last relationship.
Video.title: Sex Junkies

Video.summary: Emani says she will do anything to win back her ex-boyfriend, but her best friend tells her why she should not; Davita's husband has a confession to make; Shannon challenges her boyfriend's other woman to a wrestling match.
Video.title: Bestie Blindside

Video.summary: Anthony found out he fathered Brittany’s son a year ago and now learns she’s a lesbian! Timmy tells Jaime he’s been dating Ashley online! Josh fights to get his baby mama Katie back from his best friend Nate!
Video.title: I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving

Image.alt: I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving
I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving
I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving

Video.summary: Kiki wants to marry the man who cheated with her cousin; Tayshun blames his girlfriend for his infidelity; a porn star wants her crush to act out a scene with her.
Video.title: 50 Shades of Springer

Video.summary: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but what Callie doesn't know is that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.
Video.title: Invasion of the Angry Lovers

Video.summary: Destiny confronts her friend about trespassing on other people's property; a confession of epic proportions could be a deal breaker; a hidden secret may alter a couple's plans.
Video.title: Stone Cold Sisters

Video.summary: Fefe confronts the strippers with whom her boyfriend had a threesome; stripper Monet teaches her competitive new co-worker a lesson by sleeping with her boyfriend; Cayenne meets a dancer he follows on Instagram.
Video.title: Stripnotized

Video.summary: Kim says her husband of 7 years became possessive, lazy and demanding. So she got her revenge by sleeping with his father, Daniel! Later Chris is a player who's dating 2 women at the same time and they are not happy about it!
Video.title: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Image.alt: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Video.summary: Craig wants the best for his niece, Krysti, and feels her boyfriend, Randy, isn't right for her. Next Teresa plans to raise her child in the KKK and her fiance, a former Klan member, is here to talk some sense into her.
Video.title: Battle Of The Wounded Lovers!

Video.summary: Darleen's husband says he is addicted to strip clubs; Mary's boyfriend is obsessed with cleaning his car, and she suspects he is using it as cover for something else; Jesse's fear of commitment lands him in hot water.
Video.title: I Cheated With Three Strippers

Video.summary: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.
Video.title: It's Your Fault I'm Cheating!

Video.summary: Erin's tired of playing house and is ready to tell Eric she's been cheating, and she's moving on! Then Bill's been cheating on his girlfriend for some time and is ready to move on. But wait until she hears he's been sleeping with her step-sister!
Video.title: I'm Done!

Video.summary: A man cheats on his girlfriend, then tries to apologize; a woman realizes the father of her child could be her good friend's boyfriend; a woman gets more than she bargained for when she hooks up with her friend's roommate.
Video.title: Pregnant Secrets Dropped

Video.summary: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!
Video.title: Ex-lovers Return!

Video.summary: Kenny hooked up with a woman who is pressing him for a relationship, but he has a surprise for her; possessive Kelsey confronts her boyfriend and the woman with whom he hooked up at a house party; Jeremy wants to end his relationship.
Video.title: I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew

Image.alt: I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew
I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew
I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew

Video.summary: Alex thinks he's here to reveal his secret lover, Naomi, to his girlfriend. But, Naomi has an even the bigger secret! Next Taneisha knows she has to now tell Roger the truth about herself...she's a transsexual prostitute!
Video.title: Clash Of The Transexuals!

Video.summary: Missy and Kevin dated online, but he moved on to Whitney. Missy won’t stop chasing him! Rebecca won’t let Tony get away with cheating on her. His friends say she’s lying! Stacy’s best friend Amanda crashed with her and slept with her man Bryan!
Video.title: You Can't Run From Me!

Video.summary: Derrick reveals a secret he has been keeping from the woman he has been seeing; lesbian stripper Diana is on a mission to break up one relationship and start a new one; Summer is a lesbian who cannot stop having sex with men.
Video.title: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold

Image.alt: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold
Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold

Video.summary: Today we're exposing the sexy lives of porn stars and those who seek to become them.

Video.summary: Susan is disgusted by her son Ron's incestual behavior with her niece, Tracy. But Ron insists that he is in love with Tracy and he will not let anyone get in the way of him marrying her.
Video.title: Kissin' Cousins

Video.summary: Insecure Star likes Deandre, but he prefers her stripper cousin; Dominic has a confession to make to his girlfriend; Kristin cheats with her husband's teenage nephew.
Video.title: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Image.alt: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Video.summary: Strippers Precious and Jewels have too much in common; John learns that his friend is responsible for the downturn in his marriage; DJ's girlfriend wants to see other people.
Video.title: She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Image.alt: She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Video.summary: Cooda's tells his girlfriend that their relationship is over because he's gay and he's running off with a male lover! Then Kathy has always been fond of sharing with best friend Cindy, but that never included Cindy's husband Marquis!
Video.title: You Cheated...So Beat It

Video.summary: Greg's is trying to end his relationship with Terrance and her sister Ciera! Then, Lisette met George in prison and thought she found her match. But even nude beaches weren't enough to keep him interested because now he's sleeping with a stripper!
Video.title: Battle Of The Dancing Queens!

Video.summary: They say you never forget your first time well these guests are here to live out their unforgettable first-time fantasies.
Video.title: First-Time Fantasies

Video.summary: Mookie has a confession that could be a deal breaker; Kelvin assures his girlfriend that an encounter he had at a movie theater meant nothing; two women's feelings are mutual, but one of them has a boyfriend.
Video.title: Awkward Hook-Ups

Video.summary: A woman discovers her man has been cheating with various women; a woman suspects her husband is cheating with their roommate.
Video.title: Jerry's Talk Show Host Special

Video.summary: Santa and his elves to answer 7 very special Christmas letters from needy children. Watch these happy faces!
Video.title: Dear Santa…
